scripts.build: npm run prisma:generate && npm --workspace @atacredits/shared run build && npm --workspace @atacredits/ad-providers run build && npm --workspace @atacredits/token-optimizer run build && npm --workspace @atacredits/backend run build && npm --workspace ata-credits run build
scripts.typecheck: npm run prisma:generate && npm --workspace @atacredits/shared run typecheck && npm --workspace @atacredits/ad-providers run typecheck && npm --workspace @atacredits/token-optimizer run typecheck && npm --workspace @atacredits/backend run typecheck && npm --workspace ata-credits run typecheck
scripts.test:backend: npm run prisma:generate && npm --workspace @atacredits/backend run test
